name: oh-my-beads
description: Multi-agent orchestration using beads_village — Scout, Architect, Worker, Reviewer under a Master Orchestrator

plugins.name: oh-my-beads
plugins.description: Multi-agent orchestration plugin for Claude Code with 8-step workflow, 3 HITL gates, and beads_village concurrency management

features: Mr.Beads: 8-step autonomous workflow with 3 HITL gates for complex features
Mr.Fast: 2-step lightweight workflow for quick fixes and small changes
12 specialized agents (Scout, Architect, Worker, Reviewer, and more)
16 skills including validation, swarming, compounding, and debugging
beads_village MCP integration for task tracking and file locking
Automatic prompt leverage to strengthen user prompts before agent routing
Role-based tool enforcement and Bash safety via hooks
onboarding: Say 'omb build me X' for the full 8-step workflow or 'mr.fast fix Y' for quick fixes. Run 'setup omb' to initialize your workspace. See /oh-my-beads:doctor if anything goes wrong.
